allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'./.env'}\); const keys=['PORT','APP_URL','JWT_SECRET','SMTP_HOST','SMTP_PORT','SMTP_USER','SMTP_PASS','SMTP_FROM']; for \(const k of keys\) console.log\(k+': '+\(process.env[k]?'[set, len='+process.env[k].length+']':'[MISSING]'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('./server/db'\).db; const before=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM games'\).get\(\).n; db.prepare\('DELETE FROM games'\).run\(\); db.prepare\(\\"DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name='games'\\"\).run\(\); const after=db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM games'\).get\(\).n; console.log\('games deleted:', before, '-> remaining:', after\);")

Bash(node -e "const {db}=require\('./server/db'\); for \(const t of ['users','games','password_resets']\) { try { console.log\(t, '=', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM '+t\).get\(\).n\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\(t, 'err', e.message\); } } console.log\('---sample games---'\); console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT id, user_id, name, length\(data\) AS data_len, created_at FROM games ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5'\).all\(\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {db}=require\('./server/db'\); db.prepare\('DELETE FROM games'\).run\(\); db.exec\('DELETE FROM sqlite_sequence WHERE name=\\'games\\''\); db.pragma\('wal_checkpoint\(TRUNCATE\)'\); db.exec\('VACUUM'\); console.log\('games after:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM games'\).get\(\).n\);")

Bash(node -e "const {db}=require\('./server/db'\); console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT id, name FROM games'\).all\(\)\); db.prepare\('DELETE FROM games'\).run\(\); console.log\('cleared, now:', db.prepare\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM games'\).get\(\).n\);")
